case_title: FIRESIDE THRIFT CO.A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS TAPIA, MARIO F. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO.A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAPIA, MARIO F.
